title: Air-Fried Crispy Spanish Courgette Stir-Fry
description: A sweet and crispy crowd-pleaser Spanish dish featuring air-fried courgettes that are perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Cut the courgettes into thin, julienne strips. Season them with sea salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an air fryer basket at a high temperature of 375°F (190°C) for about 2 minutes until hot.
Add the courgette strips to the hot air fryer basket and cook for about 4-6 minutes or until crispy, turning once halfway through cooking time.
In another pan, sauté garlic in a little bit of olive oil until fragrant. Add the red pepper flakes and toss with the courgettes.
Mix together in a bowl to combine, garnish with more black pepper if desired.
